subcodes.first_line: O divine friends! Jináb-i-Áqá Aḥmad hath made mention of those companions in his letter, for which praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی جناب آقا احمد ذکر آن یاران را در نامه خویش نموده اند که الحمد
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
